items.question: What makes a good voice over script?
items.answer: Creating effective voiceover scripts involves: 1) Writing specifically for TikTok voiceover delivery 2) Keeping sentences optimized for social media 3) Using punctuation to control voiceover pacing 4) Adapting text to match your chosen voice style 5) Testing how your script sounds with different TikTok voiceover options.

items.question: How to do a voice over on TikTok?
items.answer: To add a voice over to your TikTok video: 1) Generate your voiceover using our TikTok voiceover generator 2) Download the audio file 3) Open TikTok and tap the + button to create a new video 4) Record or upload your video footage 5) Tap "Voice-over" in the editing panel 6) Import your pre-recorded voiceover file 7) Adjust the timing and volume levels 8) Add any background music or sound effects 9) Preview to ensure perfect sync 10) Save and post your video with the professional voiceover.
